judgment.summary: Alphabet exhibits robust growth, strong profitability, and a solid balance sheet, trading at a premium justified by its AI-driven expansion.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 91.6%; next earnings date is 2026-07-23.
positives: Revenue growth 21.8% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 81.2% demonstrate significant top and bottom-line expansion.
Operating margin 36.1% and profit margin 37.9% indicate strong operational efficiency and pricing power.
Return on equity 38.9% shows excellent profitability relative to shareholder investment.
Substantial free cash flow of $27.92B supports continued investment and shareholder returns.
Analyst consensus is 'strong buy' with a mean target price suggesting upside potential.
negatives: Forward P/E of 26.87 and PEG ratio of 1.53 suggest the stock is priced for continued high growth.
Beta of 1.27 indicates higher volatility relative to the broader market.
Dividend yield is minimal at 0.2%, offering little income support.

news.paragraph: Alphabet is actively expanding its AI capabilities beyond search, highlighted by a new partnership with Amdocs to enhance its Gemini Enterprise Agent Marketplace. This strategic move signals a commitment to leveraging AI across various business segments, aiming to capture growth opportunities in a rapidly evolving technological landscape. Traders should monitor developments in AI adoption and competitive positioning as the company navigates this transformative phase.

headlines.title: Alphabet (GOOGL): Moving Beyond Search in the AI Revolution
Even at $5 Trillion, Nvidia Is Underappreciated
Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) Expands Gemini Enterprise Agent Marketplace with Amdocs Partnership
